name: @shamu/adapter-gemini
description: Gemini AgentAdapter for Shamu. ACP-stdio variation of @shamu/adapter-cursor (Phase 7.C). Launches `gemini --acp` from @google/gemini-cli and projects ACP session/update notifications + session/request_permission round-trips into Shamu's AgentEvent stream. No runtime dependency on @google/gemini-cli (111 MB unpacked) — binary ships via `npm install -g @google/gemini-cli` and is resolved from vendorCliPath / GEMINI_CLI_PATH / PATH at spawn time. Known upstream issue: google-gemini/gemini-cli#22647 (non-ACP writes bleed into the JSON-RPC stream); malformed lines surface as AcpProtocolError → non-fatal `error` AgentEvent.
